channel.title: FX Auto Feed
channel.description: Auto-generated FX macro and trade idea summaries

item.title: FX Summary: 2025-07-05 — Entry 1
item.description:
Macro: US NFP missed expectations (147K), triggering a pullback in USD. Fed cut expectations rise. Trump’s July 9 tariff deadline creates headline risk.
Sentiment: Market sentiment cautiously bearish USD. Risk assets jittery on trade tensions.
Technical: EUR/USD holding above 1.08; GBP/USD near 1.28; USD/JPY showing mild weakness on safe-haven demand.
Trade Ideas:
- EUR/USD: Long — Supported by weak USD; eyes 1.09
- USD/JPY: Short — Risk-off flows favor JPY
- GBP/USD: Buy dips — 1.2750 support likely to hold
